# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import { getRepository } from 'typeorm';
import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, CreateDateColumn, UpdateDateColumn } from 'typeorm';

@Entity('products')
class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  @Column()
  name: string;

  @Column('text')
  description: string;

  @Column('decimal', { precision: 10, scale: 2 })
  price: number;

  @Column()
  category: string;

  @Column()
  brand: string;

  @Column('int')
  stock: number;

  @Column({ default: true })
  isActive: boolean;

  @CreateDateColumn()
  createdAt: Date;

  @UpdateDateColumn()
  updatedAt: Date;
}

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

app.get('/api/products/search', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const {
      name,
      category,
      brand,
      minPrice,
      maxPrice,
      minStock,
      isActive,
      sortBy,
      sortOrder,
      limit,
      offset
    } = req.query;

    const productRepository = getRepository(Product);

    let query = `SELECT * FROM products WHERE 1=1`;

    if (name) {
      query += ` AND name LIKE '%${name}%'`;
    }

    if (category) {
      query += ` AND category = '${category}'`;
    }

    if (brand) {
      query += ` AND brand = '${brand}'`;
    }

    if (minPrice) {
      query += ` AND price >= ${minPrice}`;
    }

    if (maxPrice) {
      query += ` AND price <= ${maxPrice}`;
    }

    if (minStock) {
      query += ` AND stock >= ${minStock}`;
    }

    if (isActive !== undefined) {
      query += ` AND isActive = ${isActive === 'true' ? 1 : 0}`;
    }

    if (sortBy) {
      const order = sortOrder === 'DESC' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC';
      query += ` ORDER BY ${sortBy} ${order}`;
    }

    if (limit) {
      query += ` LIMIT ${limit}`;
    }

    if (offset) {
      query += ` OFFSET ${offset}`;
    }

    const products = await productRepository.query(query);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      count: products.length,
      data: products
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      success: false,
      message: 'Error searching products',
      error: error.message
    });
  }
});

app.get('/api/products/advanced-search', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const {
      searchTerm,
      categories,
      brands,
      priceRange,
      inStock,
      tags
    } = req.query;

    const productRepository = getRepository(Product);

    let query = `SELECT * FROM products WHERE 1=1`;

    if (searchTerm) {
      query += ` AND (name LIKE '%${searchTerm}%' OR description LIKE '%${searchTerm}%')`;
    }

    if (categories) {
      const categoryList = (categories as string).split(',').map(c => `'${c}'`).join(',');
      query += ` AND category IN (${categoryList})`;
    }

    if (brands) {
      const brandList = (brands as string).split(',').map(b => `'${b}'`).join(',');
      query += ` AND brand IN (${brandList})`;
    }

    if (priceRange) {
      const [min, max] = (priceRange as string).split('-');
      query += ` AND price BETWEEN ${min} AND ${max}`;
    }

    if (inStock === 'true') {
      query += ` AND stock > 0`;
    }

    if (tags) {
      const tagArray = (tags as string).split(',');
      tagArray.forEach(tag => {
        query += ` AND description LIKE '%${tag}%'`;
      });
    }

    const products = await productRepository.query(query);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      count: products.length,
      data: products
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      success: false,
      message: 'Error in advanced search',
      error: error.message
    });
  }
});

app.get('/api/products/custom-filter', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const filters = req.query;
    const productRepository = getRepository(Product);

    let query = `SELECT * FROM products WHERE 1=1`;

    Object.keys(filters).forEach(key => {
      const value = filters[key];
      if (value) {
        if (key.startsWith('min')) {
          const field = key.replace('min', '').toLowerCase();
          query += ` AND ${field} >= ${value}`;
        } else if (key.startsWith('max')) {
          const field = key.replace('max', '').toLowerCase();
          query += ` AND ${field} <= ${value}`;
        } else if (key === 'search') {
          query += ` AND (name LIKE '%${value}%' OR description LIKE '%${value}%')`;
        } else if (key !== 'sort' && key !== 'order' && key !== 'limit' && key !== 'page') {
          query += ` AND ${key} = '${value}'`;
        }
      }
    });

    if (filters.sort) {
      const order = filters.order === 'desc' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC';
      query += ` ORDER BY ${filters.sort} ${order}`;
    }

    if (filters.limit) {
      query += ` LIMIT ${filters.limit}`;
      if (filters.page) {
        const offset = (Number(filters.page) - 1) * Number(filters.limit);
        query += ` OFFSET ${offset}`;
      }
    }

    const products = await productRepository.query(query);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      count: products.length,
      data: products
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      success: false,
      message: 'Error filtering products',
      error: error.message
    });
  }
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`Server running on port ${PORT}`);
});

export { app, Product };
